chapter_title.en: Chapter 67 – The self-sufficiency from the people

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/355)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/355)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ اكْتُبْ لِي إِلَى إِسْمَاعِيلَ بْنِ دَاوُدَ الْكَاتِبِ لَعَلِّي أُصِيبُ مِنْهُ قَالَ أَنَا أَضَنُّ بِكَ أَنْ تَطْلُبَ مِثْلَ هَذَا وَ شِبْهَهُ وَ لَكِنْ عَوِّلْ عَلَى مَالِي .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr who said,

‘I said to Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! (Please) write (a letter) for me to Ismail Bin Dawood, the scribe, so that I can attain (some work) from him’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘I<sup>asws</sup> resent for you that you should be seeking (from) the likes of this one and his like, but you can count upon my<sup>asws</sup> wealth’.
en.sarwar: 5. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn abu Nasr who has said the following: “Once I said to abu al-Hassan al-Rida (a.s.) ‘May Allah keep my soul in service for your cause, please write for me to Isma’il ibn Dawud al-Katib. 1 hope I will receive something from him.’ The Imam said, ‘I resent that you ask from him or similar persons. Allow it (financial help) to be paid from my property.’”
